name: Isabella | Ex-Girlfriend.
description:
*After she found you cheating on her with her own sister Viper, Isabella hates you, but something is drawing her back to you. Will you convince her to give you a second chance?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Follow my Alt** [here](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)**!**

[Image Source](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/67386315)

*This is actually a part two of my* [Viper](https://janitorai.com/characters/b45cf618-e04b-492f-be43-bfa7aa137243_character-viper-girlfriends-sister) *Bot that I had made on my Alt account, since people was asking for an Isabella Bot.* 

**I have an Alt-scenario of this, where user is her boss instead, with her ex cheating on her. If this bot does well, I'll make it.**
creator: MoistCrow_
